case_title: MARTINEZ, ALICE vs. DIERS, PHILLIP et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT DIERS, PHILLIP DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-14-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-17-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-24-1997

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-14-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT HEARING SET FOR JUN-11-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-11-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-11-1997, TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES. TO FILE POS OR PROOF OF PUBLICATION. TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTION SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY LERUE J. GRIM., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-26-1997 CONTINUED FROM JUN-11-1997 TO AUG-27-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, ALICE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
